summary: Repaired review routing so pending review work is builder-role targeted rather than operator-targeted.
operator_request: operator is not assignable to review. change reviewer to be builder

changes.detail: Updated narada.builder role from implementer to builder through `narada task roster add narada.builder --role builder --format json`.
Changed pending review fallback suggested_owner from operator to builder and suggested_command to use <builder-agent>.
Changed generic review work eligibility so builder-role agents can own review work while operator is no longer a review-owner keyword.

verification: `narada work-next --agent narada.builder --peek --format json` selects an open role-targeted review obligation with target_role=builder and target_agent_id=null.
`narada work-next --agent narada.architect --peek --format json` lists pending_reviews with suggested_owner=builder and <builder-agent> review commands.
